items.title: Cross-entropy decomposition
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  HQ["H(P, Q)"]
  HP["H(P)"]
  KL["D_KL(P || Q)"]
  HQ --> HP
  HQ --> KL
  noteNode["H(P,Q) = H(P) + D_KL(P || Q)"]
items.caption: Cross-entropy splits into Shannon entropy of P plus KL penalty for using Q instead of P.

items.title: Classification as cross-entropy
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  label["one-hot P (true y)"] --> loss["-log q(y)"]
  model["softmax Q from logits"] --> loss
  loss --> train["gradient update on theta"]
items.caption: Training pushes model probability q(y) toward 1 on each labeled example.
